summary: CEO OS Module frontend testing completed successfully. All 3 CEO pages (Overview, Revenue, Users) render correctly within CeoLayout. CEO login redirects to /ceo/overview, sidebar navigation works, KPI drill-downs open modals, user table is interactive with search/filter/sort, and non-CEO users are correctly blocked from /ceo routes.

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration warnings: <span> cannot be child of <tr>/<tbody>/<thead>. This is caused by React's dynamic rendering wrapper spans inside table elements. Does not affect functionality but may cause SSR hydration issues.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about HTML structure in CeoUsers.js table - <span> elements being injected inside <tr>/<tbody> by React's dynamic rendering. This is a React/tooling artifact and doesn't affect functionality.
seed_data_creation: None - all data from mock ceoData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO OS module uses mock data from /app/frontend/src/data/ceoData.js. All 3 pages (Overview, Revenue, Users) are fully functional. CEORoute in ProtectedRoute.js correctly blocks non-CEO users. The module has its own isolated layout (CeoLayout.js) with fixed sidebar (200px) and navbar (64px).

ceo_login_redirect.description: CEO user (garcia.rapha2@gmail.com) redirects to /ceo/overview after login

ceo_layout_elements.description: CeoLayout renders with sidebar, navbar, main content area, CEO badge, spet. branding, theme toggle, logout button

revenue_targets_sidebar.description: Revenue Targets section visible with Weekly, Monthly, Annual progress bars

overview_page.description: 6 KPI cards, Growth Banner, MRR Growth chart, Customer Growth chart, Revenue Breakdown pie chart, Quick Stats list

revenue_page.description: 8 KPI cards (2 rows of 4), Revenue Last 30 Days chart, MRR Breakdown bar chart

users_page.description: 4 KPI cards, 3 charts (Users by Plan, MRR by Plan, Status Distribution), customer table with search, plan filter, status filter, export button, sortable columns

sidebar_navigation.description: Overview, Revenue, Users links navigate correctly

kpi_drill_down.description: KPI cards are clickable and open drill-down modals

user_row_drill_down.description: User table rows are clickable and open customer detail drill-down

period_filter.description: Period filter renders on all 3 pages with Today, This Week, This Month, This Year, Custom options

theme_toggle.description: Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode

non_ceo_access_restriction.description: Non-CEO user (teste@teste.com) cannot access /ceo routes - redirected to /venue/home

table_filters_and_sort.description: Search filter, plan filter, status filter, and column sorting all work correctly

navbar_date_display.description: Date displayed correctly in navbar (Tuesday, March 24, 2026)

mocked_data_note: ALL CEO module data is from mock file /app/frontend/src/data/ceoData.js - no backend API calls
